author: Evan Borodow
name: 11L Gated XSA + Cosine LN + BigramHash4K
blurb: 11-layer int6 model with gated exclusive self-attention (learned per-layer strength), cosine LN scale decay, 4096-bucket BigramHash, SmearGate, EMA, late QAT, partial RoPE (16 dims), and stride-64 sliding window eval. 27M params, zstd-22 compressed under 16MB.
